title: Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|reb|italics=1}} {{Youmay|the ''Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina'' anthology|the ''[[Star Wars: Tales from Mos Eisley]]'' comic}} {{Book |not_appearance=1 |image=[[File:TalesfromtheMosEisleyCantina.jpg]] |title=''Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina'' |author=Various |cover artist=[[Stephen Youll]] |illustrator=*[[Michael Manley]] *[[Aaron McClellan]] *[[Al Williamson]] |editor=[[Kevin J. Anderson]] |publisher=[[Bantam Spectra]] |early release= |release date=[[July]] [[1995]]{{PenguinRandomHouse|url=books/3540/tales-from-mos-eisley-cantina-star-wars-legends-by-kevin-anderson-editor/9780553564686|text=Tales from Mos Eisley Cantina: Star Wars Legends}} {{C|Paperback}} |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=*Paperback *eBook |pages=416 |isbn=9780553564686 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]]–[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |series=[[Tales series|''Tales'' book series]] |preceded by= |followed by=''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]'' }} {{Quote|Mos Eisley Spaceport. You will never find a more wretched hive of scum and villainy. We must be cautious.''"
"''I'm ready for anything.|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], quoted in ''Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina''|''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]''}} '''''Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] anthology book featuring sixteen short stories set in and around [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]]. It was edited by [[Kevin J. Anderson]], and it was first published in [[July]] [[1995]] by [[Bantam Spectra]]. The book was followed by ''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]'' and reprinted in the [[1997]] compilation book [[Star Wars: Tales (omnibus)|''Star Wars: Tales'' omnibus]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''In a far corner of the universe, on the small desert planet of Tatooine, there is a dark, nic-i-tain–filled cantina where you can down your favorite intoxicant while listening to the best jizz riffs in the universe. But beware your fellow denizens of this pangalactic watering hole, for they are cutthroats and cutpurses, assassins and troopers, humans and aliens, gangsters and thieves....'' ==Contents== {| {{Prettytable}} ! Title !! Author(s) !!
